title: Root Inc (ROOT) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Profitability and Strategic Growth
text: Root Inc delivered net income profitability for the second consecutive quarter in Q4 2024, with net income of $22 million, representing a $46 million improvement year-over-year. The company also generated operating income of $35 million and adjusted EBITDA of $43 million in the fourth quarter, improving $47 million and $43 million year-over-year, respectively. CEO Alex Timm emphasized: At Root, it's all about the long term. Root expects cession levels to remain materially consistent with Q4's 9% of earned premium, representing a significant reduction from prior years. Root reduced the difference between gross and net loss ratios to one point, a reduction of 10 points year over year in Q3 2024, demonstrating the effectiveness of their reinsurance strategy changes. Improvements in reinsurance costs were made possible through continued improvement in underwriting results. Root's focus continued to be purchasing per risk and catastrophe reinsurance covers to protect the business from tail risk events and volatility. The partnership distribution channel grew significantly, with new writings through this channel representing roughly a third of overall new business by the end of 2024. Root is investing in a product to extend the company's technology to the independent agency channel to broaden customer access and enhance distribution networks.
